prompt: A realistic scene of a tailor carefully adjusting a highly detailed suit on a mannequin with unusual proportions, making it fit perfectly, while several normal people in the background look unable to wear similar suits. The suit is over-engineered with excessive seams and tailoring details. No text, no labels. Photorealistic, natural lighting, studio environment, highly detailed fabric textures.
metaphor: A tailor creates a perfectly fitted suit for one unusual mannequin while others cannot wear it, showing a model that memorizes one case but fails to generalize
